title: 宝塚記念の後に・研磨せよ

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Wow, the Beast's Successor killed it again!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Her build and skills are pretty different from Maruzensky's, but... I don't know what it is, but she has a spark of something I can't take my eyes off of!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
With Maruzensky gone, she might be the only one
to bring some fire to the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Child in the Stands
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wondeeeer! You were awesome in the
Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Child in the Stands
text_block_list.text:
The way you powered straight to the goal was so,
so, SO cool!

text_block_list.name: Child in the Stands
text_block_list.text:
Dad! Hey, Dad! I wanna come back and see the
next race!

text_block_list.name: Seasoned Fan
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh... I see. You're a full-blown fan of hers
now, are you?

text_block_list.name: Child in the Stands
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I love Grass Wonder! I can't wait to see how
she's gonna run next time!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Grass Wonder, huh...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm back, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There is still plenty of room for improvement,
considering how I let Spe outmatch me...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
However, I have no regrets. I demonstrated who I
am at this moment in time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
All I can do is press on and show who I will
become.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's exactly it!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello there, El... I thought you might pay me
a visit.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well, obviously! Of course I'd come to see your
race!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And now I'm positively certain without a doubt!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I can't take on the world if I don't beat you first,
Grass Wonder!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm givin' you an official challenge!
Face me, Grass!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: At the Mainichi Okan!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The Mainichi Okan... Isn't that a G2 race? I would
have thought you'd pick something more
grandiose.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No, this year's Mainichi Okan is special! The
Otherworldly Front-Runner will be there!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You know who that is, right? Silence Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Silence Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka is an Umamusume who's a little
older than Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's got a distinctive runaway style, where she
takes a huge lead upfront and doesn't let anyone
catch up. She's the talk of the racing scene.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Interesting. This could turn out to be a very
important race.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Right?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The Marvelous Front Runner, Silence Suzuka! The
Brazen Blue Ogre, Grass Wonder! And the
World's Strongest Racer, me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The time: this fall! The place: Fuchu! The
occasion: the Mainichi Okan! You can't say no,
Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My eyes remain fixed on the top—without
reservation, without digression. I am making my
way forward, step by step.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Should something block my path, I will overcome
it, no matter what or who it is.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That includes you, El.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Excelente!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Welp, no reason to stand here dawdlin' any
longer. It's time to train, train, train!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Adiós!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Ah. Wait a moment, El.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I was taken aback during the moment... but who
do you think you're calling an ogre, hm?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Eeegh! My tail! Ow, ow, OWWW!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass, El... you both really are something else.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Even today, I just...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You raced well, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka?! Whoa! You came today?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I happened to be close by and remembered
you were racing.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Thank you! I think having Grass in the
race helped me relax while I ran.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That reminds me! Is it true you're going to run
in the Mainichi Okan?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, it's on my agenda... Why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I heard Grass and El talking about you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: They're both aiming for the Mainichi Okan, too!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...! Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I see... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...? Um, Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... Pardon me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
After seeing how Grass raced today, I got a little
excited.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what new sights I'll see when I leave
those two in my wake...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah... I'm sorry to keep you. You must be tired.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'll get going, then. See you at the dorm, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: S-sure... See you then.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Excited about... what she'll see?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Would she feel the same way if I was racing
instead?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Today, I might have won, but I don't feel like I
did my best against Grass.
